name: Zucchini and Cheese Quesadillas

ingredients.item: Cotija cheese, Monterey Jack, or shredded cheddar

method: Put half of the zucchini in between two tortillas. Top it with half of
Then add the remaining cheese and zucchini.
Sprinkle half of the scallions and chile.
Put the remaining two tortillas on top of it, and seal it gently.
Take a nonstick skillet and heat oil over the medium heat. Then brush
the pan with one teaspoon of oil.
Put one quesadilla in the pan and cook until it is golden brown.
Brush the top with one teaspoon of more oil and flip the quesadilla.
Repeat this with the second quesadilla.
